Bash(git -C "T:/Tiago/FinanceApp" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Make debt TotalAmount optional for indeterminate debts

Allow registering debts without knowing the total amount \(e.g. college
tuition, negotiated debts\). TotalAmount is now nullable in the domain,
DTOs, and frontend. The debts page adapts its display: debts with a
total show a progress bar, debts without show monthly payment info.
InterestRate defaults to 0 when left empty.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
